mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM model m LEFT JOIN model_tag mt ON m.id = mt.model_id WHERE m.status = 1
AND m.category = #{category}
AND (m.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.provider LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR mt.tag_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY m.sort_order ASC, m.id ASC
